title: PromptQL: Multiplayer AI that replaces Slack | Product Hunt
excerpt: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.
content_html: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.
content_text: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.

blocks.html_en: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.

sentences.en: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats.
sentences.zh: 停止在 Slack 和每个人的私人 AI 聊天之间分割团队知识。

sentences.en: PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads.
sentences.zh: PromptQL 是面向团队的多人 AI：想想共享线程中的 Claude 或 ChatGPT。

sentences.en: Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning.
sentences.zh: 标记队友审查、纠正和完善答案，同时不失去推理。

sentences.en: Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events.
sentences.zh: 连接数据库、SaaS 应用程序、编码代理和事件。

sentences.en: PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds.
sentences.zh: PromptQL 捕获部落知识并建议共享大脑更新，以便上下文复合。

sentences.en: Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.
sentences.zh: 范围和多用户权限使正确的人员可以访问正确的上下文。

content_html_zh: 停止在 Slack 和每个人的私人 AI 聊天之间分割团队知识。 PromptQL 是面向团队的多人 AI：想想共享线程中的 Claude 或 ChatGPT。 标记队友审查、纠正和完善答案，同时不失去推理。 连接数据库、SaaS 应用程序、编码代理和事件。 PromptQL 捕获部落知识并建议共享大脑更新，以便上下文复合。 范围和多用户权限使正确的人员可以访问正确的上下文。
